hero.title: ZIAN
hero.lede: I integrate AI into your business — as a solo engineer I build products, automate workflows and train teams. From idea to launch, with AI as co-pilot.

ask.title: Ask my
ask.lede: Type what you want to know — or click one of the cards. The AI knows my services, my setup and my process.
ask.welcome: Hi 👋 I'm Andre's AI assistant. I can answer questions about his services, pricing and process. What can I help you with?
ask.demoNote: Running a mocked conversation right now. Once Ollama is wired up, a real local LLM responds.
ask.freeFormResponse: Good question — the real AI can answer that once Ollama is wired in. Until then: click one of the cards, or email Andre directly at hello@zian-ai.dev. He replies personally within 24h.

quickReplies.label: I need a web app
quickReplies.response: Solid. Andre builds modern web apps with React 19, Tailwind v4 and AI in the workflow — from landing pages to production SaaS. A typical prototype runs in 1–3 weeks, full product in ~12 weeks. Want to message Andre directly to discuss your project?

quickReplies.label: App development
quickReplies.userText: I want a mobile app built.
quickReplies.response: Andre builds native and cross-platform mobile apps, mostly with React Native and Expo — iOS and Android from one codebase, AI features built in. Tell me roughly what app you have in mind, or book a 30-min call directly.

quickReplies.label: AI integration for my company
quickReplies.userText: We want to integrate AI into our business.
quickReplies.response: That's exactly Andre's specialty. He integrates AI where it actually saves work: custom agents, chat interfaces on your data, automated workflows — embedded into your existing systems (Slack, CRMs, internal APIs). Drop him a short brief and he'll get back within 24h.

quickReplies.label: AI course / workshop
quickReplies.userText: I'm interested in an AI course or workshop.
quickReplies.response: Andre runs in-house workshops, 1:1 coaching and structured courses — from AI basics for teams to agent design for developers. Tell him how big your team is and what you want to learn, and he'll shape a format for you.

about.body: I'm Andre Zimmermann — founder of ZIAN AI Concepts. I combine classic software engineering discipline with modern AI tooling to build faster and sharper than any agency. No middlemen. No quarterly roadmaps. You talk to the person who also builds.
about.kicker: If you want to know what AI can actually change in your business — ask me. I'll tell you honestly what's worth it and what's pure theater.

items.title: AI-powered web development
items.body: Modern web apps and landing pages, built with React and AI co-pilot in the workflow. Performant, animated, SEO-ready. From studio portfolios to production SaaS.

items.title: App development
items.body: Native and cross-platform mobile apps that feel like premium products. iOS and Android from one codebase, with AI features built in.

items.title: AI integration for companies
items.body: I integrate AI where it actually saves work: custom agents, chat interfaces on your data, automated processes. Embedded into your existing systems.

items.title: AI courses & workshops
items.body: I bring your team to production-level AI fluency. In-house workshops, individual coaching, and structured courses — from AI basics to agent design.

process.title: Three weeks.
process.lede: A discovery sprint that ends with a working thing — not a deck.

steps.label: Week 01
steps.title: Frame the bet.
steps.body: We talk. I dig into the problem, the data, the user, the constraints. By Friday, you have a tight spec and a kill-criteria document. No spec — no build.

steps.label: Week 02
steps.title: Build the version.
steps.body: I build. You see daily progress. Working software, not slides. By Friday, a real prototype runs on real data — on a real URL you can share.

steps.label: Week 03
steps.title: Live with users.
steps.body: We put it in front of three real users. Their reactions decide what's next: ship it, refactor it, or kill it. No politics. No fake metrics.

techstack.title: Tools
techstack.lede: A curated selection — not a hype list. What's on here runs in production.

contact.title: Tell me what
contact.lede: A short note works. I reply within 24 hours — usually faster.

form.name: Name
form.error: Something broke. Try again, or email me directly.
form.demo: Demo mode — set VITE_FORM_ENDPOINT in .env to receive real submissions.

consent.title: Privacy
consent.body: I use privacy-friendly analytics without cookies to see anonymously which content lands.

footer.tagline: ZIAN AI Concepts — AI-powered web & app development. Solo. Fast. Direct.

imprint.title: Imprint

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.body: Placeholder — replace with your real privacy policy (controller, hosting, contact form data, cookies, data subject rights).
